kong-sub: In classical arithmetic, congruences are remainders. But is the remainder everything?
kong-sub-2: Instead of value think rhythm. Instead of number think cycle.
kong-intro-text: This section will hold a soft introduction explaining why congruences naturally lead toward deeper structure.

kong-transition-title: What if the remainder is not enough?
